title: Actor document fetch has no response body size limit
description: actor_cache.rs:62 calls resp.json::<serde_json::Value>().await with no size cap. A remote actor server that is SSRF-reachable (public IP, passes is_private_host) can return a multi-hundred-MB JSON body, which is fully buffered in memory before parsing. Identical gap exists at server.rs:604 for the Follow handler's actor doc fetch. The 10MB limit in media.rs is not applied here. Fix: read bytes() with an explicit cap (e.g. 1MB) before JSON-parsing, or use reqwest .bytes_stream() with a hard stop. This is distinct from the decompression bomb fix in media.rs.
close_reason: Fixed: redirect::Policy::none on all clients, require Digest+Date headers, corrected body limit comment
